choices.text: strategy() with initial_capital realistic, commission_type=strategy.commission.percent (0.05-0.25), slippage=2 ticks. Without these, backtests overstate edge by 20-50%.

questions.explanation: Realistic commission + slippage required for trustworthy backtest.

choices.text: strategy.exit("Bracket", from_entry="Long", stop=slPrice, limit=tpPrice). Single call sets both; OCO behavior; one fills cancels other.
size = (equity × risk%) / (entry − stop). Risk fixed dollar amount; wider stop = smaller size; tighter stop = larger size. Standard 1-2% per trade.

questions.explanation: Account risk / stop distance = position size.

choices.text: stopPrice = entry − ta.atr(14) * 2. ATR scales with market volatility; adapts tight in calm markets, wide in fast ones. Avoids whipsaws from normal noise.
Track day-start equity; if (currentEquity − dayStart)/dayStart < −0.03 (3% daily loss), strategy.close_all() + stop trading. Prevents revenge trading and protects capital.

questions.explanation: Daily DD circuit breaker prevents account blowup.
